method: Measured raw stdout bytes that a cold Claude conversation would absorb to discover how to invoke each CLI: `which <provider>` + `<provider> --help`. Excludes any trial invocation. This is a conservative LOWER BOUND on probing cost; actual cold-start usually adds at least one trial call (another ~200-2000 bytes) before the user's real task runs.

gemini.notes: Lower bound. Realistic cold-start adds a trial -p call.

qwen.notes: Lower bound. Realistic cold-start adds a trial -p call.
